title: Implement damage application (clear invuln frames + normal hurt + DamageSource construction)

reference_files.reason: Damage application - clear invuln frames (setInvulnerableTicks(0)), normal hurt() flow, DamageSource construction (shooter non-null as attacker, null no attacker), shield block default not blocked
DamageSource attacker construction rules - shooter non-null + online -> attacker, null -> no attacker, offline -> treated as null

acceptance_criteria: DamageApplier class created with applyDamage(BulletRecord bullet, Entity target, double finalDamage) method
Before hurt: target.setInvulnerableTicks(0) (clear invuln frames to allow penetration)
DamageSource attacker: if snapshot.getShooter() non-null and resolvable as online Entity -> use as attacker/causingEntity; if null or offline -> no attacker
Normal target.hurt(damageSource, finalDamage) called (full vanilla hurt flow: armor, resistance, events preserved)
Does NOT call actuallyHurt() directly (preserves armor reduction, NeoForge damage events, death messages)
Shield block: framework DamageSource does not set shield-blocking fields, so vanilla shield block does not apply to bullets by default
Method under 50 lines (split DamageSource construction into separate helper method)
